name: dotclaude
description: Design-discipline + coding hygiene for Claude Code. Reads your project, interviews you about goals and past failure modes, then authors a customized .claude/ kit — UX audit agents, IA / a11y / token-discipline / flow-audit skills, code-review and data-integrity guardrails — tailored to your actual stack. Targeted flows: /dotclaude:design (showpiece), /dotclaude:coding, /dotclaude:planning, /dotclaude:testing, /dotclaude:data, /dotclaude:ai-workflow, or /dotclaude:init for full bootstrap.
